title: Pre-Suasion
author: Robert B. Cialdini
subline: The most important moment is before the message.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A wide spotlight beam falling from above onto an empty stage. The beam is RED. The moment BEFORE the message (the dark area to the left). -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif">
    <!-- The stage floor: a horizontal hairline -->
    <line x1="-700" y1="280" x2="700" y2="280" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- The spotlight beam: a triangle of red light, narrowing as it falls -->
    <path d="M -20 -400 L 20 -400 L 200 280 L -200 280 Z" fill="#fc1c46" opacity="0.18"/>
    <!-- The beam edges: two converging red lines from a single point above -->
    <line x1="0" y1="-440" x2="-200" y2="280" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="0" y1="-440" x2="200" y2="280" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- A single red dot at the apex (the message source) -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="-440" r="10" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Tiny mark at the stage where the message lands -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="280" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- The dark area to the LEFT: pre-suasion territory. A dim arrow pointing to the bright moment -->
    <line x1="-650" y1="0" x2="-220" y2="0" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4 6"/>
    <text x="-650" y="-30" text-anchor="start" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">PRE-SUASION</text>
    <text x="650" y="-30" text-anchor="end" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">MESSAGE</text>
    <!-- Stage whisper -->
    <text x="0" y="340" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">THE WINDOW OF ATTENTION</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A red spotlight beam from above landing on a small dot on the stage. The dark area to the left is 'PRE-SUASION' (ash), the bright spot is 'MESSAGE' (red). 320px whisper title at the top — minimalist and tense.
